subject: fix(bugs): JS bugs, visual issues, focus states, print improvements
body:
Bugs fixed:
- Event listener accumulation: Tab click handlers were added inside
  render(), accumulating on every re-render. Switched to event
  delegation on document (one listener handles all tabs)
- escapeHtml missing quote escaping: Added " — prevents broken
  HTML attributes if meta.json contains quotes
- Copy button selector too broad: querySelector('.doc-action-btn')
  always selected the first button. Now uses getElementById('copy-btn')

Visual fixes:
- Status dot colors: Hardcoded #22c55e/#a1a1aa replaced with
  var(--pico-primary)/var(--pico-muted-color) for dark mode
- Logo border-radius: Hardcoded 6px replaced with
  var(--pico-border-radius) for consistency
- Logo href: Dead anchor (#) replaced with ./ (home link)

Accessibility:
- Added :focus-visible outlines to card-links, doc-tabs, and
  doc-action-btn — keyboard navigation now shows focus indicators

Print:
- Added break-inside: avoid to table and pre elements — prevents
  code blocks and tables from splitting across pages

Tags: fix, bugs, accessibility, visual, print
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch
